---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
================================================================================
file_sorting.Rmd
================================================================================

# Helper utility: sorts microscopy TIFF files into per-cell subfolders.
# Used as the pre-processing step for many G:\ datasets before any
# analysis Rmd is run.

## What this file does

For each ``*.tif`` in the file's working directory:
1. Lists all TIFF files (``list.files`` filtered by ``grepl("tif", ...)``).
2. Creates ``Cell_NN`` subfolders (NN = 01, 02, ... zero-padded).
3. Moves files into the matching ``Cell_NN`` folder based on
   filename convention (the original ``200730_TC_proto*`` etc. naming
   embeds the cell number).

## Manuscript panel

**None — this is a utility helper, not a panel producer.** It is the
pre-analysis file-sorting step that runs ONCE per imaging dataset
before any of the analysis Rmds open that dataset's CSVs.

## Why it lives in helpers/

This file has the same body as ~10 sibling ``File_sorting.Rmd`` files
across G:\Figure*/* folders (10-copy hash group). One canonical copy
is kept in ``helpers/`` to avoid 10x duplication in the repo. The G:\
sibling copies are pre-existing and untouched.

## Beginner notes

This file uses ``filesstrings::file.move()`` (NOT base ``file.rename``)
to handle cross-drive moves cleanly. Knit-time this file IS
destructive of the working directory — it physically moves files.
Don't knit casually; only run it on a fresh imaging directory that
needs to be sorted.

## Original G:\ source (canonical of 10-copy hash group)

G:/Figure S3_Arp3/Fig. S3b/ActinRF_nested_Lifeact/241107_Lifeact_nested/File_sorting.Rmd

================================================================================
-->

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
#library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

```{r}

Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)

files <- list.files(Path_1, full.names = TRUE)

# Create subfolders
paste(Path_1, "log",  sep = "/") %>% dir.create() 
paste(Path_1, "decon",  sep = "/") %>% dir.create() 
paste(Path_1, "raw",  sep = "/") %>% dir.create() 

# Move files with size less than 1MB to 'log'
small_files <- files[grepl(".txt|.joblog|.log", files)]
fs::file_move(small_files, paste(Path_1, "log",  sep = "/") )

# Move files with names containing 'D3D' to 'decon'
d3d_files <- files[grepl("R3D_D3D.dv", files)]
fs::file_move(d3d_files, paste(Path_1, "decon",  sep = "/"))

# Move files with names containing 'R3D.dv' to 'raw'
files <- list.files(Path_1, full.names = TRUE)
r3d_files <- files[grepl("R3D.dv", files)]
fs::file_move(r3d_files, paste(Path_1, "raw",  sep = "/"))

```
